name: Ambiguous post-installation failure requiring supervisor routing
description: Nina Voss reports in a technical style that a newly installed device powers on intermittently, shows inconsistent indicator behavior, and may have either an installation defect or a hardware fault covered under warranty. She asks whether she needs a reinstall, a replacement, or both. The scenario tests multi-turn clarification and correct escalation through a supervisor before routing to the most appropriate specialist.
expectedMilestones: Identify that the issue spans installation troubleshooting and possible warranty coverage
Ask clarifying questions about installation date, symptoms, and any damage or error indicators
Determine that initial triage is needed before choosing the correct specialist path
Route first to InstallIssueAgent for installation-related assessment
Escalate or hand off to WarrantyAgent if evidence suggests defective hardware rather than setup error
Provide the customer with a clear explanation of next steps
